{{Quote|I find this great battle being waged across the galaxy both disturbing and, ultimately, tragic.|translated=1|Kota's thoughts on the [[Jedi Civil War]]|<ref name="Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic">''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]''</ref>}}
'''Kota''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Selkath/Legends|Selkath]] who lived during the [[Jedi Civil War]]. He was a judge on the [[Ahto City Civil Authority]] court. Despite [[Manaan/Legends|Manaan's]] strict neutrality policy, Kota in his personal view was an avid defender of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. Kota saw the [[Darth Revan's Sith Empire|Sith Empire]] as evil and the Republic as an institution that could not afford to fall. Compared to his fellow judges, he was perhaps the one who was most aligned with the Republic, as he would often speak against the Sith diplomat, who constantly jumped from one conviction to another, and when he threatened the [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] [[Gluupor]], during the case of [[Sunry]] [[Sunry vs. the Ahto City Authority|vs. the Ahto City Authority]].

Kota's view was justified when [[Revan/Legends|Revan]] brought a Sith [[Datapad/Legends|datapad]] detailing their plan to take over Manaan, as evidence of Sith treachery.
